response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience and relevant geospatial background through GISCollective and Green Map work, but lacks the core technical requirements. C++ experience is limited to a short 6-month stint at National Instruments over a decade ago (2014-2015), and there is no Rust experience listed. The DLang work at Sociomantic on low-latency, high-throughput systems is the closest analog to the required skill set, but it is not a direct substitute. No navigation guidance experience.
strengths: Geospatial/GIS domain experience via GISCollective and Green Map platforms
Low-latency, high-throughput systems background (DLang at Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP req/s)
Senior-level breadth across stack with strong testing/TDD discipline
concerns: Minimal and outdated C++ experience (~6 months in 2014-2015); no Rust
No navigation/routing systems or production routing pipeline experience
Recent work is predominantly TypeScript/Node.js, not systems-level C++/Rust
